allow: Bash(node -e "const yf = require\(''yahoo-finance2''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(yf.default || yf\).filter\(k => typeof \(yf.default || yf\)[k] === ''function''\)\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import yf from ''yahoo-finance2''; console.log\(typeof yf, typeof yf.quoteSummary, typeof yf.historical, typeof yf.quote, typeof yf.chart\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import yf from ''yahoo-finance2''; const inst = yf\(\); console.log\(typeof inst, Object.keys\(inst\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import YF from ''yahoo-finance2''; const yf = new YF\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(yf\)\).filter\(k => k !== ''constructor''\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import YF from ''yahoo-finance2''; const yf = new YF\(\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(yf\); const keys = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\); console.log\(keys\)")
